rows.label: qev015006_MSG0001
rows.name:
...So there was an Earthling here too.
Fufu, we've already secured the main
dish, so we'll make you into dessert-zo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015006_MSG0002
rows.name:
It's strange for dessert to open
its mouth-zo! You just need to
shut up and let us eat you-da.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015006_MSG0003
rows.name:
Here we go-zo! We will teach
you what a real hunt is![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015006_MSG0004
rows.name:
If you ran away, you'd at least
be a little charming, but
you're a cheeky dessert-zo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015006_MSG0005
rows.name:
We'll correct that misunderstanding! We
will teach you what a real hunt is-zo![ST:wait ]
